mainEntity.name: How can I hire Dharmik Gohil for game development?

acceptedAnswer.text: You can hire Dharmik Gohil for game development by contacting through the website contact form at https://dharmikgohil.art/contact.html or via email. Dharmik is available for freelance projects, contract work, and remote opportunities worldwide, specializing in Unity 3D game development.

mainEntity.name: What game development services does Dharmik Gohil offer?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dharmik Gohil offers comprehensive game development services including Unity 3D game development, mobile game development (Android/iOS), multiplayer game development with Photon, VR/AR game experiences, 2D and 3D games, game porting, and custom game mechanics development.

mainEntity.name: Is Dharmik Gohil available for blockchain development projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Dharmik Gohil is an expert blockchain developer available for hire. Services include smart contract development using Solidity, dApp development, NFT platform creation, DeFi solutions, Web3 integration, and blockchain consulting for Ethereum, Solana, and other platforms.

mainEntity.name: What is the cost to hire Dharmik Gohil as a freelance developer?

acceptedAnswer.text: The cost varies based on project scope, complexity, and duration. Dharmik offers competitive rates for game development, blockchain development, and web development services. Contact for a free consultation and custom quote based on your specific project requirements.

mainEntity.name: Does Dharmik Gohil work on remote projects?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Dharmik Gohil is available for remote work worldwide. Whether you're based in USA, UK, Canada, Europe, Asia, or anywhere else, Dharmik can work remotely on your game development, blockchain, or web development projects with flexible communication and collaboration.

mainEntity.name: What technologies does Dharmik Gohil specialize in?

acceptedAnswer.text: Dharmik specializes in Unity 3D with C#, React.js, Next.js, Node.js, Express.js, Solidity for smart contracts, JavaScript/TypeScript, Three.js, WebGL, Photon Unity Networking, MongoDB, PostgreSQL, VR/AR (Unity XR), mobile development (Android/iOS), and blockchain technologies (Ethereum, Solana, Web3.js).

mainEntity.name: Can Dharmik Gohil build multiplayer games?

acceptedAnswer.text: Yes, Dharmik Gohil is an expert in multiplayer game development using Photon Unity Networking (PUN), Photon Fusion, and other networking solutions. He has experience building real-time multiplayer games, turn-based games, co-op experiences, and battle royale games.

Dharmik Gohil is based in Surat, Gujarat, India, and is a student at CHARUSAT University (DEPSTAR College). However, he works remotely with clients worldwide and is available for both Indian and international projects in game development, blockchain, and web development.
